name: python3-flask-limiter
title: python3-flask-limiter
description:
Rate-limiting for Flask routes
Flask is a micro web framework for Python based on Werkzeug, Jinja 2 and good
intentions.
.
Flask-Limiter provides rate limiting features to flask routes. It has support
for a configurable backend for storage with current implementations for
in-memory, redis and memcache.
.
This package provides the Python 3 version of the flask_limiter module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-flask-limiter because Rate-limiting for Flask routes.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-flask-limiter as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-flask-limiter with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-flask-limiter --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
